name: David Cullen
bio: David has over 40 years of experience working with pumps and pumping systems. A cryogenic (LNG) pump design and selection specialist, he acts as Associate Consultant with Fluensys. Over the years, he has provided consulting services to major companies such as BP and TGE Marine in various sectors including Water, Oil & Gas, LNG and Marine. David avails of a wide experience and knowledge on cryogenic pump applications acquired through LNG projects carried out across the globe.
